progress.value:
✅ All nix-common.nix shellHook work complete in both flakes
✅ Uses NIX_PROFILES to split devshell/system, .profile for HM vars
✅ __DEVSHELL_HM_PATH_DONE guard prevents duplication from multiple use flake
✅ Graceful fallback for non-NixOS/non-HM
✅ nix-ld enabled
✅ Both flakes evaluate

Known limitation: /run/wrappers/bin and direct nix store paths from system env (rbenv, hyprland-qtutils, nodejs etc.) can't be identified as "system" by NIX_PROFILES check — they end up in devshell bucket. Harmless but means HM paths appear after them rather than immediately after devshell packages.
